testcase.name: inferPackConfig detects 20S pack from typical voltages()
computePackNominalResistance with null Ns returns null()
chooseBatteryCurrentWindow for null Ns uses default()
computePackNominalResistance for 20S pack()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: 20S pack should have ~360 mΩ nominal resistance. Expected <0.36> with absolute tolerance <0.01>, actual <0.44>.

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: 20S pack should have ~360 mΩ nominal resistance. Expected <0.36> with absolute tolerance <0.01>, actual <0.44>. at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:138) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.fail(JUnitSupport.kt:56) at kotlin.test.Asserter$DefaultImpls.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:694) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertTrue(JUnitSupport.kt:30) at kotlin.test.UtilsKt.checkDoublesAreEqual(Utils.kt:32) at kotlin.test.UtilsKt.checkDoublesAreEqual$default(Utils.kt:22) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertEquals(Assertions.kt:69) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertEquals(Unknown Source) at io.github.eucsoh.analysis.PackInferenceTest.computePackNominalResistance for 20S pack(PackInferenceTest.kt:113) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: inferPackConfig rounds to nearest known series()
inferPackConfig with empty valid data returns null()
estimateCellResistanceMOhm for different voltages()
